---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for RAG-Gate
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that would benefit from this feature. How would it be used?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
